generic_name: Organic whole milk yogurt from Haymilk TSG - 150g - cherry and chocolate splits
generic_name_de: Bio Vollmilchjoghurt aus Heumilch g.t.S. - 150g - Kirsche und Schokosplits
generic_name_en: Organic whole milk yogurt from Haymilk TSG - 150g - cherry and chocolate splits
generic_name_it: Yogurt biologico intero da latte fieno STG - 150g - ciliegia e scaglie di cioccolato
ingredients_text: Yogurt* 80%, cherry chocolate chip preparation 20% (sugar*, cherry juice concentrate* 2%, chocolate chips* 2% (cocoa butter*, cocoa mass*, sugar*), modified corn starch*, gelling agent: pectin*; natural cherry flavor*, elderberry juice concentrate*, lemon juice concentrate*). Gluten-free. *From organic farming.
ingredients_text_de: Joghurt* 80%, Kirsche-Schokosplitszubereitung 20% (Zucker*, Kirschsaftkonzentrat* 2%, Schokosplits* 2% (Kakaobutter*, Kakaomasse*, Zucker*), modifizierte Maisstärke*, Geliermittel: Pektin*; natürliches Kirscharoma*, Holundersaftkonzentrat*, Zitronensaftkonzentrat*). Glutenfrei. *aus biologischer Landwirtschaft.
ingredients_text_en: Yogurt* 80%, cherry chocolate chip preparation 20% (sugar*, cherry juice concentrate* 2%, chocolate chips* 2% (cocoa butter*, cocoa mass*, sugar*), modified corn starch*, gelling agent: pectin*; natural cherry flavor*, elderberry juice concentrate*, lemon juice concentrate*). Gluten-free. *From organic farming.
ingredients_text_it: Yogurt intero 80% (latte* intero pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato alla ciliegia e scaglie di cioccolato 20% (zucchero*, succo di ciliegia da concentrato* 2% sul totale, scaglie di cioccolato* 2% sul totale (burro di cacao*, pasta di cacao*, zucchero*), amido modificato di mais*, gelificante: pectina*; aroma naturale di ciliegia*, succo di sambuco da concentrato*, succo di limone da concentrato*). Senza glutine. *da agricoltura biologica.
